title: Stickland, Charlie - Chief of Joint Operations for the Permanent Joint Headquarters, Ministry of Defence - ACOBA advice
body: "Lt Gen Sir Charlie left his role at the Ministry of Defence in October 2024.  Chairman, REACT  Lieutenant General Sir Charlie Stickland KCB OBE RM sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with REACT. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
